mapper.select: SELECT p.product_name AS productName, s.quantity AS quantity, s.shelf_status AS shelfStatus, s.min_stock AS minStock, s.max_stock AS maxStock FROM stock s INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = s.product_id ORDER BY s.quantity DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM inbound_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM outbound_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT shelf_status AS shelfStatus, COUNT(*) AS count FROM stock GROUP BY shelf_status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT c.category_name AS categoryName, SUM(s.quantity) AS totalQuantity, COUNT(s.product_id) AS itemCount FROM category c INNER JOIN product p ON p.category_id = c.id INNER JOIN stock s ON s.product_id = p.id GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC

SELECT p.id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, s.quantity, s.min_stock AS minStock, s.shelf_status AS shelfStatus FROM stock s INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = s.product_id WHERE s.quantity < s.min_stock OR s.shelf_status = '缺货' ORDER BY s.quantity ASC

SELECT p.id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, s.quantity FROM product p INNER JOIN stock s ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE p.id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM outbound_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ) ORDER BY s.quantity DESC

SELECT oo.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, SUM(oo.quantity) AS totalOutbound FROM outbound_order oo INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = oo.product_id WHERE oo.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY oo.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name ORDER BY totalOutbound DESC LIMIT #{lim}
